title: A Glimpse Of China. In A Sampan.
content:
(Min River, Fo Kien.)


     Up in the misty morning,
        Up past the gardened hills,
     With the rhythmic stroke of the rowers,
        While the blue deep pales and thrills!

     Past the rice-fields green low-lying,
        Where the sea-gull's winging down
     From the fleets of junks and sampans
        And the ancient Chinese Town!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Francis William Lauderdale Adams delivers a powerful performance in "A Glimpse Of China. In A Sampan."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
